claim_boundary: Phase 11 detects negative-space candidates only. Absence is not proof. No production monitoring, content validation, contradiction detection, causal inference, prediction, alert readiness, autonomous action, or truth resolution claimed.
phase11_goal: Identify metadata-level absence and undercoverage candidates across the worldwide artifacts while preserving claim boundaries.
purpose: Detect bounded negative-space patterns: missing categories, missing source-type diversity, underrepresented lanes, and review gaps without treating absence as proof.
